estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: Complete supply halt: SM-A sole source destroyed + GMP steps at WuXi STA unavailable simultaneously. Emergency spot sourcing at 2–3× premium plus CDMO transition. Estimated +$1,840/kg worst-case; range $820–2,200/kg depending on alternative availability.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: Longest path: new SM-A supplier qualification (20 weeks) + parallel CDMO tech transfer (18 weeks) on critical path = 26 weeks to first commercial batch from alternative network.
caveats: Estimate assumes at least one alternative SM-A supplier can be identified within 4 weeks.
If no alternative SM-A supplier exists, timeline is indeterminate — supply may halt indefinitely.
Does not include regulatory filing delays for API site change.
